flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Danville Community College rose 23% between 2017 and 2020 ($7.3k → $9.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Danville Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (5.1% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Danville Community College rose 87% between 2006 and 2009 (18.1% → 33.8%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Danville Community College rose 20% between 2021 and 2024 (54.5% → 65.5%).
